response:
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT c.country
FROM singer s
JOIN concert_singer cs ON s.singer_id = cs.singer_id
JOIN concert c ON cs.concert_id = c.concert_id
WHERE s.age > 40
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT c.country
FROM singer s
JOIN concert_singer cs ON s.singer_id = cs.singer_id
JOIN concert c ON cs.concert_id = c.concert_id
WHERE s.age < 30;
```
